facts.subject: the Council
facts.object: that an excessive deficit existed in the Netherlands
facts.natural_language: The Council decided that an excessive deficit existed in the Netherlands.

source_locator.quote: the Council decided that an excessive deficit existed in the Netherlands

extra.model_quote: the Council decided that an excessive deficit existed in the Netherlands

facts.subject: Decision 2005/136/EC
facts.natural_language: Decision 2005/136/EC followed a recommendation from the Commission.

source_locator.quote: By Decision 2005/136/EC (1) following a recommendation from the Commission

extra.model_quote: By Decision 2005/136/EC (1) following a recommendation from the Commission

facts.subject: the Council
facts.natural_language: The Council made a Recommendation on 2 June 2004 addressed to the Netherlands with a view to bringing the excessive deficit situation to an end.

source_locator.quote: the Council made a Recommendation on 2 June 2004 addressed to the Netherlands with a view to bringing the excessive deficit situation to an end

extra.model_quote: the Council made a Recommendation on 2 June 2004 addressed to the Netherlands with a view to bringing the excessive deficit situation to an end

facts.subject: This Recommendation
facts.object: a deadline of 2005 at the latest
facts.natural_language: The Recommendation established a deadline of 2005 at the latest for the correction of the excessive deficit.

source_locator.quote: This Recommendation, in conjunction with Article 3(4) of Council Regulation (EC) No 1467/97 of 7 July 1997 on speeding up and clarifying the implementation of the excessive deficit procedure (2), established a deadline of 2005 at the latest for the correction of the excessive deficit

extra.model_quote: This Recommendation, in conjunction with Article 3(4) of Council Regulation (EC) No 1467/97 of 7 July 1997 on speeding up and clarifying the implementation of the excessive deficit procedure (2), established a deadline of 2005 at the latest for the correction of the excessive deficit

facts.subject: the Council
facts.object: a Council Decision on the existence of an excessive deficit
facts.natural_language: The Council is to abrogate a Council Decision on the existence of an excessive deficit when the excessive deficit in the Member State concerned has been corrected.

source_locator.quote: a Council Decision on the existence of an excessive deficit is to be abrogated when the excessive deficit in the Member State concerned has, in the view of the Council, been corrected.

extra.model_quote: a Council Decision on the existence of an excessive deficit is to be abrogated when the excessive deficit in the Member State concerned has, in the view of the Council, been corrected.

facts.subject: the general government deficit
facts.natural_language: The general government deficit is estimated at 2.3 percent of GDP in 2004.

source_locator.quote: the general government deficit is estimated at 2,3 % of GDP in 2004

extra.model_quote: the general government deficit is estimated at 2,3 % of GDP in 2004

facts.subject: the general government deficit
facts.natural_language: The general government deficit was 3.2 percent in 2003.

source_locator.quote: compared with 3,2 % in 2003

extra.model_quote: compared with 3,2 % in 2003

facts.subject: the outcome for 2004
facts.object: the Council recommendation issued under Article 104(7) of the Treaty
facts.natural_language: The outcome for 2004 is in compliance with the Council recommendation issued under Article 104(7) of the Treaty.

source_locator.quote: The outcome for 2004 is in compliance with the Council recommendation issued under Article 104(7) of the Treaty

extra.model_quote: The outcome for 2004 is in compliance with the Council recommendation issued under Article 104(7) of the Treaty

facts.subject: the government deficit
facts.object: the reference value of 3 % of GDP by 2005 at the latest
facts.natural_language: The government deficit was to be reduced below the reference value of 3 percent of GDP by 2005 at the latest.

source_locator.quote: particularly as regards the reduction of the government deficit below the reference value of 3 % of GDP by 2005 at the latest

extra.model_quote: particularly as regards the reduction of the government deficit below the reference value of 3 % of GDP by 2005 at the latest

facts.subject: Fiscal adjustment
facts.object: in the form of substantial savings measures

facts.natural_language: The additional consolidation package was decided on 14 April 2004.

facts.subject: the general government deficit
facts.natural_language: The general government deficit is projected to decline to 2.0 percent of GDP.

facts.natural_language: The general government deficit is projected to fall to 1.6 percent of GDP.
